name: pr_description_rewrite_merge
description: A PR_DESCRIPTION comment (the body still names a stale endpoint) is auto-rewritten in place; the next round is clean and the loop merges. The kernel acts (MODEL_HANDLED) and the label routes it to the PR-body rewriter, not the code fixer.

rounds.body: the PR description still lists the old /v1/upload endpoint; the diff moved it to /v2/upload
rounds.classifier_response: {"label": "PR_DESCRIPTION", "bot": "claude", "model": "sonnet", "effort": "low", "severity": "low", "reason": "PR body names the old endpoint; update the description"}
